title: Broken Barriers
writer: Meredith M. Nicholson, Sada Cowan, Howard Higgin
actors: James Kirkwood, Norma Shearer, Adolphe Menjou
plot: A young girl is forced to give up college when her father loses all his money. She soon meets and falls for a young man at a party, only to discover that he's married. As if that weren't bad enough, he is soon seriously injured in an
